scripts.cannon:publish: pnpm cannon publish cow-ethflow --chain-id 13370 --registry-chain-id 10 && pnpm cannon:record
scripts.cannon:record: pnpm cannon inspect cow-ethflow:latest --chain-id 13370 --out deploy-json > cannon/deploy.json && pnpm cannon inspect cow-ethflow:latest --chain-id 13370 --out misc-json > cannon/misc.json
